title: Month-End Close: Finalize with a Signed Close Memo
description: Produce a formal close memo documenting what was done, what's still open, and who approved it.

steps.title: Create a 'Close Memo' skill
steps.content: This skill generates a one-page memo summarizing: the period closed, total adjusting entries posted, key reconciliation results, any exceptions or open items, and the preparer/reviewer sign-off lines.

steps.title: Auto-populate from prior steps
steps.content: The skill should pull data from the workpaper package: number of AJEs, total dollar amount of adjustments, any reconciling items still outstanding. Don't re-enter data that already exists.

steps.title: Add sign-off fields and save
steps.content: Include fields for preparer name/date and reviewer name/date. Save the final memo as part of the workpaper package. This is your audit trail that close was completed and reviewed.
